zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Radcliffe於1376年出生在英國藍卡爾拉德克利夫時，他的父親James Radcliffe21歲，母親Joan Tempest28歲。他於1390年與Cecilia de   Ashton結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1431年9月4日享年55歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾可利黑洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Radcliffe于1376年出生在英国藍卡爾拉德克利夫时，他的父亲James Radcliffe21岁，母亲Joan Tempest28岁。他于1390年与Cecilia de   Ashton结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1431年9月4日享年55岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾可利黑洛。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Radcliffe was born in 1376, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, his father, James Radcliffe, was 21 and his mother, Joan Tempest, was 28. He married Cecilia de   Ashton in 1390. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 4 September 1431, at the age of 55, and was buried in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Radcliffe est né en 1376, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, James Radcliffe, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Joan Tempest, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia de   Ashton en 1390. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 septembre 1431, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Radcliffe 1376 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Radcliffe 21 und seine Mutter Joan Tempest 28. Er hat 1390 Cecilia de   Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. September 1431 im Alter von 55 Jahren und wurde in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Radcliffe è nato il nel 1376 nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, James Radcliffe, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Joan Tempest, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia de   Ashton nel 1390. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 settembre 1431, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Clitheroe, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Radcliffeが1376年にイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフで生まれた時，父James Radcliffeは21歳，母Joan Tempestは28歳であった。1390年にCecilia de   Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1431年9月4日に55歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Radcliffe(이)가 1376년 영국 랭카실르 라드클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Radcliffe(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Tempest(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1390년 Cecilia de   Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1431년 9월 4일 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 클리더에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Radcliffe nasceu em 1376, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Radcliffe, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tempest, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia de   Ashton em 1390. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de setembro de 1431, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Radcliffe родился в 1376 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени James Radcliffe было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Tempest, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia de   Ashton в 1390 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 сентября 1431 г. в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Radcliffe nació en 1376, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, James Radcliffe, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Joan Tempest, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Cecilia de   Ashton en 1390. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de septiembre de 1431, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
